title: oryzopsis pubiflora
intro: Oryzopsis pubiflora, also known as false bent or false rice grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is native to Asia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oryzopsis pubiflora include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain and swelling. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea, or made into a powder and mixed with other herbs for medicinal purposes.
